name: Vacation Adventures: Park Ranger 17 Collectors Edition
short_description: A Family Friendly Hidden Object Game set in a National Park
detailed_description:
Help Park Rangers run a sensational US National Park

Help Pinecreek’s famous Park Rangers run an awesome US National Park. Visit lots of amazing Attractions and Hike exciting Tracks & Trails. Have fun organizing events on Bluewaters Lake, Cherokee River and in the Little Goose Wildlife Sanctuary. Ride the new Heritage Trail Train. Hunt for Aztec Artefacts, tour Bluewaters Lake on Eagle, the Park’s brand new glass bottomed boat. Walk around a sensational Wild West Town and check out its Tex Mex restaurant before exploring Jailhouse Square.

Learn about Wildlife. Camp & Picnic beside Rivers and Bayous. Visit atmospheric Waterfalls, Gorges, enchanted Caves and beautiful outdoor locations. Have fun on Ranger-Led Night Prowls.

Enjoy Campfires & BBQ’s. Spot Bears, Deer and Eagles.

Play great Hogs & Puzzles, Spot 100’s of Animals, Birds, Fish and Wildlife. Protect the environment, get Souvenirs and Awards along the way.
